# Acorn House Acquisition — llms.txt
# https://acornhouseacquisition.com

> We buy houses fast for cash in North Carolina, Florida, and Texas. No repairs, no fees, no commissions. Fair cash offer within 24 hours — close in as little as 7 days.

## Company

Acorn House Acquisition LLC is a real estate investment company that purchases residential properties directly from homeowners. We are not a licensed real estate brokerage. We buy properties as-is, handle all paperwork, and close through licensed title companies.

- Phone: (786) 982-8464
- Email: info@acornhouseacquisition.com
- NC Office: 19825-B North Cove Rd #1041, Cornelius, NC 28031
- FL Office: 5342 Clark Rd #1273, Sarasota, FL 34233

## Services

- Cash home purchases (as-is, any condition)
- Subject-to purchases (for homeowners with little or no equity)
- Foreclosure prevention (we can close before auction dates)
- Inherited and probate property purchases
- Landlord exit solutions (tenant-damaged properties purchased as-is)
- Divorce and estate sales

## Markets Served

### North Carolina (Primary Market)
Charlotte Metro: Charlotte, Cornelius, Huntersville, Matthews, Mint Hill, Pineville, Davidson, Concord, Kannapolis, Gastonia, Belmont, Monroe, Indian Trail, Mooresville, Statesville
Research Triangle: Raleigh, Cary, Apex, Durham, Chapel Hill, Clayton, Smithfield
Piedmont Triad: Greensboro, High Point, Winston-Salem, Kernersville
Western NC: Asheville, Hendersonville, Hickory, Morganton, Waynesville
Coastal NC: Wilmington, Jacksonville, New Bern, Fayetteville
Eastern NC: Greenville, Rocky Mount, Goldsboro, Wilson

### Florida
Sarasota, Tampa, Miami, Orlando, Jacksonville, Fort Lauderdale, Fort Myers

### Texas
Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio

## How It Works

1. Contact us — call (786) 982-8464 or submit the form at acornhouseacquisition.com
2. Property evaluation — we assess the home within 24 hours
3. Cash offer — written offer with no obligation
4. Closing — we close through a licensed title company in as little as 7 days

## Key Facts

- Zero agent commissions
- Zero closing costs (we pay them)
- Zero repairs required
- Zero showings or open houses
- Close in 7-21 days or on your timeline
- 100+ homes purchased across NC, FL, and TX
